title: How a man of faith stops being hard on the wrong people
caption:
Most men have the harshness pointed the wrong direction.

They're soft on themselves — quiet about their own sin, patient with their own excuses — and sharp with everyone else. Their girlfriend gets what God should get. Their mom gets what the gym should have handled.

A man of God is hard on himself and gentle with the people around him. Not because it's a nice idea. Because that's the shape Christ's character actually takes in a man.

"Jesus wept. He also flipped tables." Both were right. The order mattered.

Save this for the week you notice where you've been bleeding.

#faith #christianmen #character #godlymen #manofgod #thevision #gentleness #christianity #formation
theme: He's hard on himself, gentle with others.
